fields.name: Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies a code for the Bank Export/Import setup.

fields.name: Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the bank export/import setup.

fields.name: Direction
fields.tooltip: Specifies if this setup will be used to import a bank file or to export a bank file.

fields.name: Processing Codeunit ID
fields.tooltip: Specifies the codeunit that will import the bank statement data.

fields.name: Processing Codeunit Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the codeunit that will import the bank statement data.

fields.name: Processing XMLport ID
fields.tooltip: Specifies the XMLport through which the bank statement data is imported.

fields.name: Processing XMLport Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the XMLport through which the bank statement data is imported.

fields.name: Data Exch. Def. Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies a code that represents the xml file with a data exchange definition that you have created in the Data Exchange Framework.

fields.name: Data Exch. Def. Name
fields.tooltip: There is no Help for the fields in this table. This object supports the Microsoft Dynamics NAV infrastructure and is intended only for internal use.

fields.name: Preserve Non-Latin Characters
fields.tooltip: Specifies that non-latin characters in the bank statement files are preserved during import.

fields.name: Check Export Codeunit
fields.tooltip: Specifies the codeunit that validates payment lines when you use the Export Payments to File action in the Payment Journal window.

fields.name: Check Export Codeunit Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the codeunit that validates payment lines when you use the Export Payments to File action in the Payment Journal window.
